response.justification: Bogdan is a skilled full-stack and systems developer with a broad polyglot background, but he does not meet the minimum qualifications for this role. The job requires 8 years of C++ experience as a hard floor — Bogdan's C++ exposure amounts to roughly 6 months at National Instruments and a bachelor's thesis project. His primary stack is TypeScript/JavaScript/DLang/Node.js. While he has relevant distributed-systems experience at Dunnhumby (high-throughput microservices) and some cloud exposure via AWS CDK at Optilyz, he lacks the depth in cloud compute infrastructure, C++-based systems programming, and formal technical leadership of cloud/DevOps teams that this role demands.
strengths: Distributed systems experience handling millions of HTTP requests per second at Dunnhumby, demonstrating real high-scale production work
Broad technical versatility (TypeScript, DLang, Kubernetes, AWS CDK, embedded/hardware) and a strong polyglot engineering mindset
Demonstrated staff-level and founding contributions including team mentoring, workshops, and open-source platform ownership
concerns: C++ experience is minimal (~6 months at NI + a thesis project) — far below the 8-year minimum requirement which is a disqualifying gap
No evidence of leading or architecting a cloud compute platform at scale; cloud exposure is limited to AWS CDK usage in a product context
No demonstrated 2+ year track record of technical leadership mentoring specifically cloud or infrastructure engineers
